race.comment: NEVER ORDINARY (7) made it two on the bounce when leading throughout in the Dequetteville two weeks ago. She may still not have found her ceiling and will give another terrific sight. OLE GO (1) wasted no time getting off the mark here on debut on Jan 31 then went straight to the paddock. He's been sharpened with a strong trial and has the pace to offset the wide draw quickly. This will tell us plenty about him. VERZAIN (8) couldn't keep up with NEVER ORDINARY fresh when beaten a length but she's fitter now and worth respecting with that run under her belt. LAGUNANINI (9) was flat second up after a smart debut win at Sale. The stable is known for sharp turnarounds and the freshen could be exactly what she needs.
